headline: 17+ contracts discovered across Ethereum and multi-chain deployments; 3 core tokens (USDa, sUSDa, AVL) plus governance and infrastructure contracts identified via Etherscan and GitHub audits.
short_headline: 17+ contracts across chains; 3 core tokens + audits found

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search for 'Avalon' on Ethereum returned 3 core token contracts: USDa (0x8a60e489004ca22d775c5f2c657598278d17d9c2), sUSDa (0x2b66aade1e9c062ff411bd47c44e0ad696d43bd9), and AVL governance token (0x5c8d0c48810fd37a0a824d074ee290e64f7a8fa2). All verified with LayerZero/transparent proxy architecture.
Official docs at docs.avalonfinance.xyz reference audit page; deployed_contracts_doc confirmed via docs.avalonfinance.xyz/avalon-btcfi-products/cedefi-cdp-usda/usda-audits.
Audit reports confirmed for BlockSec, SlowMist, and Salus firms. USDa audit dated 2024-10-18 located at GitHub repo avalonfinancexyz/USDa-audit-salus with public PDF URLs confirmed in search results.

GitHub organization avalonfinancexyz confirmed with 21+ public repositories. Repositories include USDa-audit-salus, USDa-audit-slowmist, USDaMinter audits, AVL token repos, and Aave V3 fork (aave-v3-core). No deployment artifacts (broadcast/deployments JSON) located in accessible repos yet.

Multi-chain deployment confirmed: Gate.io article lists Arbitrum, BNB Chain, Bitlayer, CoreDAO, Ethereum, Merlin. Protocol context specifies Binance, Ethereum, Klaytn, Berachain, Sonic, Mantle. Cross-chain via LayerZero OFT pattern implies parallel deployments per chain.
No factory pattern detected in initial search; USDa and sUSDa are direct OFT token contracts, not factory-spawned pools. AVL token uses transparent proxy (single deployment per chain).

Role taxonomy applied: USDa and sUSDa contracts define ADMIN_ROLE, MANAGER_ROLE, MINT_ROLE, BURN_ROLE, PAUSE_ROLE (AccessControl pattern). AVL token has proxy admin (transparent proxy). No governor or timelock identified yet in token contracts; may reside in lending pool contracts not yet discovered.
All 3 Ethereum token addresses trace to verified Etherscan pages from web search results. No snippet-only sightings; full contract source visible. GitHub audit repo URLs confirmed via docs site.

rationale.verdict: Discovery phase catalogued 3 core token contracts on Ethereum (USDa, sUSDa, AVL) with multi-chain deployment pattern via LayerZero, confirmed audits by BlockSec/SlowMist/Salus, and active GitHub organization. Further chains (BSC, Arbitrum, Klaytn, Berachain, Sonic, Mantle) and protocol-specific contracts (lending pools, minter, oracle) require on-chain enumeration in subsequent assessment runs. Governance token and audit structure are in place; admin actors not yet pinned.

evidence.shows: USDa token contract on Ethereum; ERC-20 token with OFT (Omnichain Fungible Token) inheritance via LayerZero; AccessControl with ADMIN, MANAGER, MINT, BURN, PAUSE roles; deployed by Avalon Labs: Deployer.
sUSDa (yield-bearing USDa) token contract on Ethereum; same OFT and AccessControl pattern as USDa; deployed 179 days prior to Dec 2025 audit reference.
AVL governance token on Ethereum; ERC-20 with TransparentUpgradeableProxy pattern; implementation at 0x3228995749610bea00b59c44f8d1df21c14027f1 (AvalonMintable); admin-controlled upgrade mechanism.

Official protocol website confirms USDa as CDP product, AVL governance token for staking (sAVL voting), and multi-chain deployment strategy. Mentions audits by 'top security firms' and 24/7 on-chain security guard.

GitHub organization with 21+ public repositories. Key repos: USDa-audit-salus, USDa-audit-slowmist, USDaMinter audits (BlockSec/Salus), USDaConvert audits, AVL-audit-slowmist, aave-v3-core fork, avalon-governance-token.

Avalon deployment confirmed on Arbitrum, BNB Chain, Bitlayer, CoreDAO, Ethereum, Merlin. AVL token mainnet address 0x5c8d0c48810fd37a0a824d074ee290e64f7a8fa2 confirmed. Article dated March 7, 2025, referencing February 13, 2025 data.

Official Avalon docs audit page references BlockSec, SlowMist, and Salus as audit firms. Links to GitHub audit reports: Salus USDa report at github.com/avalonfinancexyz/USDa-audit-salus/blob/main/Avalon-Finance_USDA_audit_report_2024-10-18.pdf and AALoan report 2024-10-17.

unknowns: D1: BSC, Arbitrum, Klaytn, Berachain, Sonic, Mantle explorer searches not yet performed; no USDa/sUSDa/AVL contract addresses on non-Ethereum chains pinned to evidence.
D2: Full deployed_contracts_doc page contents not fetched; docs.avalonfinance.xyz fetch failed; cannot confirm complete address list per chain.
D4: No Foundry broadcast/ or hardhat-deploy/ artifacts discovered in accessible GitHub repos; deployment commit SHAs not yet pinned.
D6: D6 inapplicable; no factory pattern identified for USDa/sUSDa/AVL tokens; possible lending pool factories or pool registries not yet enumerated.
D8: AVL token implementation address 0x3228995749610bea00b59c44f8d1df21c14027f1 sourced from Etherscan contract read (AvalonMintable); proxy admin address not yet retrieved from storage reads.

Admin addresses: MINT_ROLE, BURN_ROLE, PAUSE_ROLE granters and DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE holders on USDa/sUSDa not extracted; proxy admin and proxy implementation updater on AVL token not extracted. Require on-chain read calls (defipunkd /api/contract/read for owner(), getOwners(), or role mappings) to pin actor addresses and classes.

protocol_metadata.about: Avalon USDa is a Bitcoin-backed CDP stablecoin and core component of Avalon Labs' CeDeFi lending platform. USDa allows Bitcoin holders to borrow USD-denominated stablecoins collateralized by BTC, without liquidation risk, while sUSDa is a yield-bearing version earning protocol revenue. AVL is the governance token enabling staking (sAVL) and voting on protocol parameters. The protocol is deployed across Ethereum, BSC, Arbitrum, Klaytn, Berachain, Sonic, and Mantle with LayerZero cross-chain messaging.
